On this day in 1789, the United States held its first Presidential election under the newly ratified Constitution.

George Washington, the Father of our Nation and Warrior for Freedom, was ultimately unanimously elected President of the United States. 

May we never forget the sacrifices he and all of our forefathers made for our Great Nation.

‘George Washington Lansdowne Portrait’ -Gilbert Stuart

tweets.text:
One of the biggest consequences of America Last, globalist trade policies was the collapse of our nation’s industrial might. 

As factories shuttered and jobs offshored, communities were destroyed and families were ripped apart. 

For years, politicians and bureaucrats allowed this globalist status quo to continue — until President Trump came to the White House. 

Unlike Presidents before him, President Trump is committed to putting AMERICANS FIRST. 

That’s why he’s secured record investments in our Nation’s Industry, pursued an America First trade agenda, and is working to reshore our Jobs. 

Under President Trump AMERICANISM,  not globalism, will Prevail.

Globalist economic policies have inflicted catastrophic damage on our Nation.

Decades of unrestrained migration, endless offshoring of jobs, and a system that put foreign workers first resulted in American-Born workers having jobs and opportunity stolen from them. 

Now, the tide is turning. 

Under President Trump’s leadership, ALL net job growth is going to American-Born Workers, we’re ending rampant visa fraud, and historic investments are pouring into our Nation. 

There’s a lot of progress to make in our fight to fix decades of globalist damage, but the Future of our Homeland is brighter now that Patriots are in control. 

May God Bless America.

THE YEAR OF AMERICAN REVIVAL. 

Under President Trump:

✅ ALL net job growth has gone to American-Born Workers 

✅ Native-born jobs are UP 2.7 MILLION

✅ We’re cracking down on rampant H-1B fraud 

✅ 100% of job growth has been in the PRIVATE sector 

✅ HISTORIC investments in American Industry are being secured 

✅ Foreign-born jobs are DOWN by 1.7 MILLION 

And we are JUST GETTING STARTED.

Stay the course. More to come in 2026, Patriots.

tweets.text:
For decades, globalists stacked the deck against Americans.

They pursued policies that put foreign workers first, sold our jobs out to countries like China, and allowed nearly unrestricted migration into our nation.

President Trump is bringing this globalist disaster to an end. 

This year, he’s already taken action to end to H-1B abuse, restore industry and jobs to our nation, and ensure AMERICANS come first in our job market. 

There’s still a long way to go and a lot of adversity ahead, but we will not stop fighting for you. 

AMERICANS FIRST!

For years, we’ve continued the status quo of growing the federal education bureaucracy, despite declining test scores and worse outcomes for our students. 

Under President Trump’s leadership, the status quo is no longer acceptable. 

We’re working with our partners at @usedgov to eliminate failed bureaucracy and streamline education and workforce development programs under our department.

This brings education closer to the states and ensures our students are the TOP PRIORITY!

tweets.text:
For four years, politicians and bureaucrats in D.C. touted the Biden economy as strong — and criticized anyone who disagreed.

But the data tells a much different story. 

Under Biden’s administration, foreign-born workers accounted for a whopping 48% of job gains, including ALL net job growth in 2024. In May 2024 alone, 263,000 foreign-born workers joined the labor force while 171,000 native-born Americans LEFT. 

Plus, due to inflationary spending policies, real wages plummeted by $3,000 under Biden and the affordability crisis spiraled out of control. 

Joe Biden and his administration failed the American Worker. 

Now, under President Trump’s leadership, we’re working every single day to fix the colossal mess Biden made.
